Checking PR #8983 for branch plnd/pr-dispatch-remote-03-08-0959...

session.assistant:
All checks pass. Implementation complete.
**Summary of changes:**
**`src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py`** — Added remote dispatch support: - Added `@repo_option` decorator and `target_repo` parameter to `pr_dispatch` command - Created `_validate_planned_pr_for_dispatch_remote()` — validates plans via `RemoteGitHub.get_issue()`, extracts branch name from plan-header metadata (no local git required) - Created `_dispatch_planned_pr_plan_remote()` — commits impl-context files and dispatches workflow entirely via GitHub REST API - Created `_dispatch_remote()` / `_dispatch_local()` to cleanly separate the two paths - Extracted `_print_dispatch_summary()` helper shared by both paths - Command branches on `isinstance(ctx.repo, NoRepoSentinel)` or `target_repo` presence
**`tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py`** — Added 8 new tests: - `test_dispatch_remote_dispatches_workflow` — happy path, verifies workflow dispatch and impl-context commit - `test_dispatch_remote_plan_not_found` — 404 handling - `test_dispatch_remote_missing_label` — rejects plans without `erk-plan` label - `test_dispatch_remote_closed_plan` — rejects CLOSED plans - `test_dispatch_remote_requires_plan_number` — error when no plan number in remote mode - `test_dispatch_remote_multiple_plans` — batch dispatch - `test_dispatch_remote_posts_queued_comment` — verifies comment posting - `test_dispatch_remote_with_base_branch` / `test_dispatch_remote_with_ref` — option threading
PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8983
